response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) directly matching the role's focus on internal automation tooling and AI agents. Strong polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, Kotlin-adjacent via JVM exposure through Java) and demonstrated architecture/TDD discipline from RIDE Capital fit the senior IC profile, though explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, and Vitest experience is not evident from the resume.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with recent TS/Node.js/React/MongoDB and AI-agent/MCP tooling work
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, Docker/Kubernetes
Polyglot breadth (TS, Java, D, C/C++, Python-adjacent) and architecture experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (uses Jest-era stacks)
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is older (Altom, robotic arms era)
Limited explicit cloud breadth — AWS mentioned, but no GCP/Azure signal
